title: mentha × dalmatica
intro: Mentha × dalmatica, also known as Corn Mint or Dalmatian Mint, is a hybrid species of mint native to Europe. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful for treating digestive issues, fever, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha × dalmatica include its ability to alleviate nausea, improve digestion, and reduce stress, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Mentha × dalmatica is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
